chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appl. No.26 of 2026 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah Fresh case 1. For orders on M.A. No.499/2026 2. For orders on M.A. No.500/2026 3. For hearing of main case Date of hearing & order 09.02.2026 Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor, ANF = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J:- The Anti-Narcotics Force (ANF) has filed this criminal miscellaneous application for cancellation of bail granted to respondent, Islam Gul, by the learned trial Court vide impugned order dated 14.07.2025. 2. This is a case of alleged recovery of 6 kilograms of ice from stones, which was being shipped to Australia. The respondent was identified as accused in the investigation on the basis of a statement of co-accused Anwer that shipment was booked by him. The record further shows that the said co-accused Anwer has also been granted bail. 3. We have heard learned Special Prosecutor, ANF, and read the impugned order. We find no illegality in the said order granting bail to the respondent, as his name has been introduced in the case on the basis of a statement of co-accused, who himself has been granted bail. Consequently, we find no merit in this criminal miscellaneous application, which is accordingly dismissed along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
